metaData.Ingredients: Water, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Myristyl Alcohol, Steartrimonium Chloride, Fragrance, Asparagopsis Armata Extract, Glucosyl Hesperidin, Sorbitol, Hydrolyzed Rice Protein, Ascophyllum Nodosum Extract, Keratin, Pentylene Glycol, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Thymus Vulgaris (Thyme) Flower/Leaf/Stem Extract, Eriobotrya Japonica Leaf Extract, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Extract, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract, Perilla Ocymoides Leaf Extract, Sambucus Nigra Flower Extract, Cymbopogon Schoenanthus Leaf/Stem Extract, Melilotus Officinalis Extract, Alpinia Speciosa Leaf Extract, Spiraea Ulmaria Flower Extract, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-10, Polyquaternium-7, Hydrolyzed Silk Pg-Propyl Methylsilanediol, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Hydrolyzed Silk, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Soluble Collagen, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Panthenol, Biotin, Dipentaerythrityl Hexahydroxystearate/Hexastearate/Hexarosinate, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Carapa Guaianensis Seed Oil, Sclerocarya Birrea Seed Oil, Calophyllum Inophyllum Seed Oil, Adansonia Digitata Seed Oil, Prunus Domestica Seed Oil, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Seed Oil, Theobroma Grandiflorum Seed Butter, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Hydrogenated Apricot Kernel Oil, Phytosteryl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Ceramide Ng, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Salicylic Acid, 1,2-Hexanediol, Cholesterol, Menthol, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Tea-Cocoyl Glutamate, Potassium Cocoyl Hydrolyzed Collagen, Glyceryl Stearate, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Quaternium-18, Quaternium-33, Isopropyl Alcohol, Butylene Glycol, Propylene Glycol, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Tocopherol, Ubiquinone, Tetrasodium Edta, Phenoxyethanol, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil
metaData.Key Information:
No Weigh Down
Lightweight Organic Argan Oil and Ceramides in a Silicone-free formula smooths and softens hair, providing smooth shine and silky feel without weighing hair down.

Strengthens Hair to Reduce Breakage
Formulated with Hydrolyzed Keratin, Hydrolyzed Silk, Hydrolyzed Collagen to repair hair cuticle cracks, restoring elasticity and strength.

Maintains Healthy Scalp
Contains 14 plant extracts including Rosemary, Peppermint, Alpinia Leaf, and Chamomile to provide antibacterial, healing, repairing and deodorizing effects for a healthy scalp environment.
metaData.Preparation: After using  Extra Anti-Dandruff Shampoo, apply evenly through wet hair. Leave on for a while and rinse.
metaData.SAP Product Name: MOIST DIANE PERFECT BEAUTY EXTRA ANTI-DANDRUFF TREATMENT 450ML
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool place, avoid direct sunlight.

product.name: Moist Diane Perfect Beauty Extra Anti-Dandruff Treatment

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Dimethiconol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Perfume, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Carbomer, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Amodimethicone, Glycol Distearate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, PEG-45M, Cyclotetrasiloxane, Trideceth-10, Disodium EDTA, Cocamide MEA, Phenoxyethanol, Mica, Trideceth-12, Cetrimonium Chloride, Cyclopentasiloxane, Titanium Dioxide, Dimethyl Palmitamine, Glycerin, Acetic Acid, Silica, Sodium Hyroxide, Lysine HCl, Salvia Hispanica Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, BHT
metaData.Key Information: Due to its special professionally quality formulation of chia seeds and amino-vitamin, hair loss and thinning is significantly reduced. It also promotes stronger thicker hair growth and provides essential nutrients for the hair.
metaData.Preparation:
• Pre-Wash:
1. Gently brush to detangle hair before washing
2. Rinse thoroughly with warm water and do a light scalp massage to remove dirt and grease before shampoo (Allows quicker lathering of shampoo as well)
• Shampoo:
1. Apply to wet hair, gentle massage to work into a lather and rinse thoroughly
2. Lightly squeeze the shampoo from roots to ends and rinse thoroughly
3. Rinse well
• Condition:
1. Squeeze conditioner into your palm and rub hands together to help distribute evenly
2. Apply conditioner to wet hair from mid-lengths to ends, leave for 2 minutes -3 minutes and rinse well
3. Follow with hair mask and rinse completely
• Styling:
1. Rinse completely, be extremely gentle when towel-drying to reduce damage caused by friction
2. Finish by styling with your favourite TRESemmé products
• Note:
1. For protection from heat styling tools, use keratin smooth heat protect hair spray before you style
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes
2. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water

Gentle Cleansing to Rebalance Scalp
Infused with Organic Argan Oil to create a rich, fine foam to gently and effectively cleanse sebum, dirt and styling residue. Infused with Menthol to soothe and relieve scalp itching.

Reduces Dandruff & Itching of Scalp
Formulated with Salicylic Acid, O-Cymen-5-ol & Tea Tree Oil to help fight dandruff, soothe scalp irritation, and reduce flaking.

Maintains Healthy Scalp
Contains 14 plant extracts including Rosemary, Peppermint, Alpinia Leaf, and Chamomile to provide antibacterial, healing, repairing and deodorizing effects for a healthy scalp environment.
